category: AI-assisted administrative support for solo insurance agents

constraints: has warm contacts rather than needing cold lead generation

core_problem: Agents lose time converting scattered warm-contact context into usable call prep and follow-up materials.
primary_outcome: Save 2 to 4 hours per week through faster meeting prep and follow-up consistency.
deliverables: 10 done-for-you note-prep packs for real warm contacts

safe_language: organization of existing client and prospect information
avoid_language: close more policies with AI advice

sales_angle: Lead with time saved and more consistent follow-up for existing warm contacts.
validation_plan: identify highest-value deliverable for future iteration
